rationale: Section 45.053 limits guaranteed bonds based on the permanent school fund's cost value, not local property tax bases or homestead exemptions. The proposed homestead exemption increase does not alter the bond guarantee cap or the fund's valuation.
quote: the commissioner may not approve bonds for guarantee under this subchapter if the approval would result in the total amount of outstanding guaranteed bonds under this subchapter exceeding an amount equal to 2-1/2 times the cost value of the permanent school fund
_note: No direct statutory conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school districts from reduced property tax revenue is not addressed by this section's operative mechanism.
